nasb.text: Then nations heard about him; He was captured in their pit, And they brought him with hooks To the land of Egypt.

esv.text: The nations heard about him; he was caught in their pit, and they brought him with hooks to the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 列國聽見了， 就把牠困在他們的坑中； 他們用鈎子 把牠帶到埃及地去。

ccb.text: 列国的人知道后， 便设陷阱捉住它， 用钩子拉到埃及。
